title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Visakhapatnam-based team.

About Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions!
